utterance_pair.utterance: Hi! I'm planning a trip and need some help finding a train that leaves from Broxbourne to Cambridge on Wednesday, departing after 11:00 AM. Also, could you tell me about the main differences between British and American rail systems?
That train works for me, so please book tickets for 6 people on that 11:32 AM train from Broxbourne to Cambridge on Wednesday.

Actually, I also want to make a reservation at a Chinese restaurant in the centre of Cambridge for the same group, at 6:45 PM on the same Wednesday. I prefer somewhere expensive and high quality. Can you help with that?
Thanks! Meanwhile, could you please provide me with the booking reference numbers for both the train and the restaurant? Also, what do you think makes a great military movie stand out from the rest?
